cards.text: Setting - The couple's home - Nighttime as they prepare for bed
Incident - They heard a suspicious noise suggesting a potential break-in.
Initial Reaction - The wife advised her husband to stay quiet and listen.
Realization - Both pretended to sleep. - Observed someone was indeed trying to break into their home.
Husband's Plan - Devised a plan and shared it with his wife in a whisper.
The Thief's Assumptions - Believed the couple was awake, so waited for them to fall asleep. - Attempted to gather information on valuables by eavesdropping.
Couple's Strategy - Engaged in a staged conversation about naming a future child.
Name Discussion - Proposed the name **Rama** for the child. - Acted out scenarios using this name.
Role of 'Rama' - Rama was none other than the village Kotwal.
Clever Code - Mentioned 'Rama' multiple times to alert the kotwal discreetly.
Outcome - The kotwal heard his name and responded promptly.
Resolution - Rama apprehended the thief during the attempted break-in.
Safety Secured - The couple’s clever plan ensured their home and valuables remained secure.
Lesson Learned - A creative and calm mindset can avert crises and protect against dangers.
